name: Dragon War
short_description: A real-time combat game played by the flying dragon in the third person. At this stage, the game mode is mainly chaos. The main themes of the game are flying dragon and magic.
detailed_description:
current version includes a basic single battle mode with AI in a simple map with weather effects and day night systems.
you can choose one of the six flying dragons that you like to fight with computer players in the scene.

Including Dragons：


#1 Desert Dragon.
#2 Forest Dragon.
#3 Plains Dragon.
#4 Polar Dragon.
#5 Undead Dragon.
#6 Volcano Dragon.

Find all the other flying dragons around you and kill them with your claws and teeth or your magic fireball.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean
